info.title: Museu do Trajo API
info.description: API for the Museu do Trajo project.

schema.title: Response Get Counts Analytics Counts Get
Response Get Item Locations Analytics Item Locations Get

get.description: Get a paginated list of bookings.

post.description:
Login endpoint. 
Parameters
----------
user_credentials : OAuth2PasswordRequestForm
    The user credentials.
db : Session
    The database session.
Returns
-------
dict
    A dictionary containing the access token and token type.

Create a new exhibition and accept multiple image uploads (multipart/form-data).

Images will be uploaded to configured R2 (preferred) or saved to local `image-folder`.

get.description: Get a paginated list of exhibitions.

parameters.name: collection_type

schema.description: Filter by collection type (e.g. permanent, temporary, archived)
schema.title: Collection Type

parameters.description: Filter by collection type (e.g. permanent, temporary, archived)

put.description: Update an existing exhibition. All fields are optional.

delete.description: Delete an exhibition and its associated images.
Delete an image from an exhibition.

post.description:
Accepts a multipart file upload and streams it to the configured R2 bucket.
Returns a `public_url` which points to /uploads/proxy/{key} (the proxy route you already have).

parameters.name: key

schema.description: Object key in the bucket, e.g. users/123/img.png
schema.title: Key

parameters.description: Object key in the bucket, e.g. users/123/img.png

get.description:
Get a user from the database by id. 
Parameters
----------
db : Session
    The database session.
current_user : schemas.TokenDataSchema
    The current user.
Returns
-------
dict
    A dictionary containing the user.
Raises
------
HTTPException
    If the user is not authorized to perform the requested action
    or if the user does not exist.

post.description:
Create a user and commit it to the database. 
Parameters
----------
user : schemas.UserCreate
    The user to create.
db : Session
    The database session.
Returns
-------
dict
    A dictionary containing the created user.
Raises
------
HTTPException
    If the user is not authorized to perform the requested action.

get.description: Get a paginated list of users.

delete.description:
Delete a user from the database by id. 
Parameters
----------
user_id : UUID
    The id of the user to delete.
----------
user_id : UUID
    The id of the user to delete.
db : Session
    The database session.
current_user : schemas.TokenDataSchema
    The current user.
Returns
-------
None
Raises
------
HTTPException
    If the user is not authorized to perform the requested action
    or if the user does not exist.
